use_cases: Selecting emojis for messaging and social interactions
Adding emoji reactions to content in collaboration tools
Emoji input in content creation and note-taking applications
Symbol selection in design and productivity tools
Expressing sentiment in feedback and survey forms
ai_summary: A React-based popover primitive component built with Radix UI, designed to serve as the container for an emoji picker interface. Features smooth entrance/exit animations, keyboard navigation support, and accessible positioning. The component provides the overlay foundation for interactive emoji selection workflows in messaging, social, and productivity applications.
